lessons.title: Primary Law — Treaties and the Charter
lessons.description: We begin at the very top of that hierarchy: primary law. Primary law is the constitutional bedrock of the entire European Union legal order.

lessons.title: Secondary Law — Regulations, Directives and Decisions
lessons.description: We have seen that primary law — the Treaties and the Charter — sits at the apex of the EU legal order.

lessons.title: Delegated Acts, Implementing Acts and Comitology
lessons.description: We have examined primary law and the core types of secondary legislation — regulations, directives, and decisions.
